message:
feat: Add project root detection and global runtime cache

- Detect project root via pyproject.toml → setup.py → .git markers
- Use two-tier build structure:
  - Project-local: <project>/.metal0/gen/ for codegen and binaries
  - Global: ~/.metal0/runtime/ for shared runtime library
- Runtime built once per machine, shared across all projects
- Generated code uses 'gen/' subfolder (industry standard: Android, protobuf)
- Fix batch compilation paths for new directory structure
- Update cleanStaleCache for centralized .metal0/gen/ structure
